name: Sarah DB - Update Conversation Context
description: Update conversation summary and intent after a voice call

example.description: Example: Update context after voice call

input.conversation_summary: Customer interested in enterprise pricing. Discussed team size requirements. Scheduled follow-up call for next Tuesday.

request.summary: Customer interested in enterprise pricing. Discussed team size requirements. Scheduled follow-up call for next Tuesday.

field_descriptions.context_id: UUID context ID from customer lookup response
field_descriptions.conversation_summary: Updated summary of the conversation (can include voice call info)
field_descriptions.intent: New intent based on call outcome
field_descriptions.last_agent_action: Description of what action was taken (e.g., 'Voice call completed')

notes: Use context_id (UUID) in the URL path, not customer_id
All fields are optional - only include what you want to update
summary field gets overwritten, so include previous context if needed
intent helps track automation state for follow-ups
